================================================================================
HYBRID: Euler/ResNet MTL (Solution A strength) + TCN MTL branch (Solution B strength)
 - Euler: rich categorical embeddings + ODE-style temporal update + conservative heads
 - TCN: causal/dilated temporal pattern extractor on compact temporal feature subset
 - Hybrid: calibrated ensemble weight + (alpha, delta) to improve budget/error_rate under FPR constraint
